reviews.comment:
Aceptable . Carisimo al punto de que es un abuso los precios. Después cuando funden Dicen que el país no da para más. Culpa de esta gente que parece que con cada cosa que venden se quieren hacer millonarios(que ya lo deben ser) es que se elige otro lugar! No recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Acceptable. Extremely expensive, to the point of being outrageous. Then, when they go bankrupt, they say the country can't take any more. It's the fault of these people who seem to think they want to become millionaires with every item they sell (which they probably already are), that's why people choose another place! I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlbEtiazhBRRAB
